## What changed 

Briefly describe the changes introduced in this PR 
Focus on behavior level or file level modifications 
summarize the important parts without repeating the entire diff

## Why 

Explain what problem this PR solves 
Provide context behind what you did
if there were alternatives considered , explain why you didn't use them 


## How to test 

provide the steps to verify :
1- run the application 
2- what commands to run
3- mention the expected output that confirms this works 
4-If automated tests are included explain what do they validate 
5- If tests are not included explain why 

## checklist

- [ ] I have tested these changes locally
- [ ] I have updated documentation if behavior changed
- [ ] I have ensured existing tests pass
